phoneticUs: 藢f蓱藧sfo蕣藞pro蕣ti藧n; 藢f蓱藧sfo蕣藞pro蕣ti藧瑟n
meaning: n.[鐢熷寲] 纾疯泲鐧借川
examples: Osteopontin is a multifunctional phosphoprotein containing GRGDS sequence which functions in cell adhesion and chemotaxis.
In this study, a novel approach of enrichment of phosphopeptides has been developed prior to phosphoprotein analysis by mass spectrometry.
Objective:To observe expression of dentin phosphoprotein (DPP) in developing rat teeth, to get a better understanding on teeth development.
